word: G464 - ἀνταγωνίζομαι - antagōnízomai - an-tag-o-nid'-zom-ahee - Strive against

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνταγωνίζομαι

- Transliteration: Antagonizomai

- Phonetic: an-tag-o-nid'-zom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to struggle, fight

- Origin: from G473 and G75

- TDNT entry: 03:14,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G473 and G75; to struggle against (figuratively) (antagonize): - strive against.
